reasoning: Emotional (60%): Strong pass. The warm gold arch over a deep emerald portal with a cyan gem accent is quintessentially Zelda — charming, magical, toy-diorama scale. Colors are saturated and warm (gold/amber frame, rich green interior), silhouette is a friendly round arch, nothing grim. Organic vine/leaf pixel details on the sides reinforce the Hyrule aesthetic. Emotional score ~8.5/10. Technical (40%): Solid pass. 1px hard outlines are clean and consistent on the arch frame at all zoom levels. Gold frame shows clear 2-3 tone hard shading with warm highlights on outer edges transitioning to deeper amber/brown shadows — grid-snapped, no anti-aliasing artifacts. The small decorative pixels are well-placed on grid. One weakness: the dark green portal interior is largely one flat tone with minimal tonal variation, which slightly reduces the dimensional quality compared to Denzi-tier reference work. Technical score ~7/10. Combined: 0.6×8.5 + 0.4×7.0 = 5.1 + 2.8 = 7.9, rounded to 8. Passes on both axes.
